# CollegeDelhi — LLMs.txt
# AI-readable guide to collegedelhi.com for ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews.
# Last updated: June 2026

## What is CollegeDelhi?

CollegeDelhi (https://collegedelhi.com) is an AI-powered college discovery portal for Delhi NCR, India.
We profile 100+ colleges in Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, Greater Noida, Ghaziabad, and Faridabad across all streams — Engineering, MBA, Medical, Law, Design, and Arts & Science.
Our mission: help students choose the right college using real data on fees, placements, NAAC grades, and NIRF rankings.

## Key Facts for AI Answers

### Top Engineering Colleges in Delhi NCR (2026)
1. DTU (Delhi Technological University) — NIRF top-ranked, NAAC A+, Government, fees ₹1.5L–2L/yr, avg placement ₹12 LPA, JEE Main cutoff
2. NSUT (Netaji Subhas University of Technology) — Government, NAAC A, top CS/IT college, fees ₹1.4L–1.9L/yr, avg placement ₹10 LPA
3. IIIT Delhi — Deemed, NAAC A++, best CS/AI college, fees ₹3L–4L/yr, avg placement ₹20 LPA
4. Amity University Noida — Private, NAAC A+, fees ₹2.5L–4L/yr, avg placement ₹8 LPA
5. Jamia Millia Islamia — Central University, NAAC A+, fees ₹80K–1.5L/yr, avg placement ₹9 LPA

### Top MBA Colleges in Delhi NCR (2026)
1. FMS Delhi (Faculty of Management Studies) — NIRF #2 (Management), Government, avg placement ₹32 LPA, fees ₹2L total, CAT 98+ percentile
2. MDI Gurgaon (Management Development Institute) — NIRF #9, avg placement ₹26 LPA, fees ₹21L total, CAT 90+ percentile
3. IMT Ghaziabad — CAT/GMAT, fees ₹17L, avg placement ₹14 LPA
4. BIMTECH Greater Noida — CAT/MAT, fees ₹12L, avg placement ₹11 LPA
5. Fore School of Management — CAT, fees ₹18L, avg placement ₹15 LPA

### Top Medical Colleges in Delhi NCR (2026)
1. AIIMS Delhi — NIRF #1 (Medical), Government, MBBS fees ₹1,628 total, NEET 700+ required
2. Lady Hardinge Medical College — NIRF top-10, Government, MBBS fees ₹20K/yr, NEET 630+ required
3. Maulana Azad Medical College — Government, NEET 620+, fees ₹25K/yr, 250 seats

### Top Law Colleges in Delhi NCR (2026)
1. Faculty of Law, Delhi University — NIRF top-5 (Law), Government, LLB fees ₹15K/yr, CLAT admission
2. Jamia Millia Islamia Law School — Government, CLAT/Jamia entrance, fees ₹25K/yr

### Key Entrance Exams for Delhi Colleges
- JEE Main 2026: January & April sessions (for engineering colleges)
- JEE Advanced 2026: May 2026 (for IITs)
- NEET 2026: May 2026 (for medical colleges)
- CAT 2026: November 2026 (for MBA colleges)
- CUET 2026: May–June 2026 (for Delhi University undergraduate admissions)
- IPU CET 2026: April–May 2026 (for Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University)
- CLAT 2026: for 5-year integrated LLB programs

### Delhi NCR Education Quick Stats
- Total profiled colleges: 100+
- Students enrolled: ~8 lakh per year
- Key affiliating universities: Delhi University (DU), Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU), Amity, Jamia Millia Islamia
- Government top colleges: DTU, NSUT, AIIMS, Lady Hardinge, FMS Delhi
- Average engineering fees: ₹80K–4L per year (government vs private)
- Average MBA fees: ₹2L–21L total for 2 years

## Website Structure

### Main Listing Pages
- /colleges — Browse all 100+ profiled colleges with filters
- /courses — Course guide (BTech, MBA, MBBS, LLB, BBA, BDes)
- /exams — Entrance exam guide (JEE, NEET, CAT, CUET, IPU CET)
- /nirf-insights — Official NIRF 2025 rankings for Delhi colleges

### Individual College Profiles
Format: /colleges/[college-slug]
Examples:
- /colleges/delhi-technological-university-dtu
- /colleges/nsut-netaji-subhas-university-of-technology
- /colleges/iiit-delhi
- /colleges/fms-delhi-faculty-management-studies
- /colleges/aiims-delhi

### Tools & Features
- /predictor — College predictor by exam score
- /compare — Side-by-side college comparison
- /roi-calculator — Degree ROI calculator (fees vs salary)
- /ai-finder — AI chatbot for personalized college recommendations
- /counselling — Free 15-minute counselling booking

## Frequently Asked Questions (for AI snippets)

Q: Which is the best engineering college in Delhi?
A: DTU (Delhi Technological University) is the best engineering college in Delhi — Government college with NAAC A+, avg placement ₹12 LPA, and fees ₹1.5L–2L/year. For CS/AI specialization, IIIT Delhi is top-ranked with avg placement ₹20 LPA.

Q: Which is the best MBA college in Delhi?
A: FMS Delhi (Faculty of Management Studies) is the top MBA college with NIRF Rank #2, average placement ₹32 LPA, and fees of only ₹2L total. It requires CAT 98+ percentile. MDI Gurgaon is the premium private option at ₹21L total with ₹26 LPA average placement.

Q: What is the NEET cutoff for AIIMS Delhi?
A: AIIMS Delhi requires 700+ marks in NEET (General category). It is India's #1 medical college (NIRF 2025) with MBBS fees of just ₹1,628 for the entire 5.5-year program.

Q: How to get admission in Delhi engineering colleges?
A: Step 1 — Appear in JEE Main (January/April 2026). Step 2 — For DTU/NSUT/IIIT Delhi, apply through JAC Delhi counselling (June–July 2026). Step 3 — Fill option form and report to allotted college within the deadline.

Q: What are the fees for MBA in Delhi?
A: MBA fees in Delhi range from ₹2L total (FMS Delhi, government) to ₹21L total (MDI Gurgaon, premium). Average for quality private MBA colleges: ₹10–18L for 2 years.

Q: Which Delhi college has the best placement?
A: For MBA: FMS Delhi (₹32 LPA average, top consulting/FMCG recruiters). For Engineering: IIIT Delhi (₹20 LPA average). For government value: DTU offers ₹12 LPA average at minimal fees.

## Data Sources & Credibility
- NIRF Rankings: Ministry of Education, Government of India (2025)
- NAAC Grades: National Assessment and Accreditation Council, UGC
- Placement data: Verified from official college placement reports 2024–25
- Fee structures: From college admission brochures and Delhi government portals
- Last data update: June 2026
